businessContext_i18n.fr: Taille de la transaction en lots.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tamaño de la operación en lotes.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of pips the price moved.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Pips, die sich der Preis bewegt hat.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify inputs before making financial decisions.
Consult a licensed financial advisor for personalized advice.

description.short: Calculate forex profit/loss in account currency from pip movement.
description.long: Calculate forex profit/loss in account currency from pip movement.

short_i18n.en: Calculate forex profit/loss in account currency from pip movement.
short_i18n.tr: Parite hareketinin hesap para Unitindeki kâr/zarar karsiligini hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den Forex-Gewinn/-Verlust in Kontowährung aus der Pip-Bewegung.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le profit/perte de change dans la devise du compte à partir du mouvement en pips.
short_i18n.es: Calcular ganancia/pérdida de forex en la moneda de la cuenta a partir del movimiento de pips.
short_i18n.ar: حساب الربح/الخسارة في الفوركس بعملة الحساب من حركة النقطة.
